title: 'Absolute madness': Row over plan to demolish Nazi bunker under Berlin
summary_full: City officials want to build flats on the city centre site but others say it should be preserved as part of Germany's history.
summary_public: City officials want to build flats on the city centre site but others say it should be preserved as part of Germany's history.
